titleStmt.title: SII 24.336: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 336. (A.R. No. 106 of 1938-39.) II PRĀKĀRA, TIERS OF THE WEST WALL OF THE PAGALPATTU-MAṆḌAPA

summary.p: Registers a gift of land to the sthānikas of the temple for a garden called Etirājan-tōṭṭam for rearing various kinds of fruit trees and flowers for use in the temple, by Karaṇikka Ponnambalanātha, son of Karaṇikka Bhārati Viṭṭhaṇṇa of Śrīvatsa-gōtra. The donor is said to have purchased the plot of land for the garden for 30 honnu and to have made an endowment of another land 2(1/2) vēli in extent for its formation and maintainance in Uppūr in Malenāḍu-Mēlaimuri in Tiruchināppaḷḷi-chāvaḍi, formerly granted to Nallār-Nayiṉār by Aṇṇappa-Oḍeyar of Tirukkōvalūr, in exchange for three shares of his (the donor's) ēkabhōga village Bhāratī-Viṭṭhaṇṇapura.
The record is in Kannaḍa engraved in Grantha characters and is dated Śaka 1370 (in words), Vibhava, Pushya, śu 2, Friday corresponding to 1448 A.D., December 27, Friday, ·83.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . vijayābhyudaya śakavaruṣa sāviradamūnūṟa Ēppattanēya vartta māna vibhava samvatsarada puṣyaśuddha bidigēu śukravāradalū śrīvatsagōtra da Āśvalāyana sūtrada karaṇikka bhārativiṭhṭhaṇṇagaḷa makkaḷu karaṇikka pēnnāmbalanāthagaḷu śrīraṅgada sthānikarigē kōṭṭa dharmmaśāsanada śilā likhitadakramavē(vē)ntēndarē śrīraṅganāthadēvarigē Ēḷanīru tēṅginakāyi daṇḍēhūu patragaḷa Ubhaya Ūnā§ māḍuvasēvēyāgi Ēndēndunaḍava mari yādēyanu niu sēnāpatidēvara Anujñēyinda krayavāgi māḍi kōṭṭa śāsana pramāṇa . varāhamuvattu hōnnīgē nāu kōṇḍu śrī raṅganādhadēvarigē samarppista yatirājana tōṭṭakakē simē Ānēyē dipakakē rāmacandradēvaraguḍigēu tēṅkalu caturmmukha gō purakkē paḍuvalu Akaḷaṅkan madilagē paḍagalu mūḍalu Ī catussimē gē Ōḷagaṇa tēṅgina maragaḷu hamsinamara gaḷu Ī Ugaḷu hē ruḷē nimbēya maragaḷu sampigēyamaragaḷu sēvantigē jājiiruvantigē malligē paṭṭigē muntādahalau hūvina giḍugaḷu sahavāgi Ēnuḷḷaṇḍā phala varggapuṣpavarggagaḷanēśrīraṅganādhadēvara tiruvārādhana naivēdyada Avasaragaḷalu salisūdu Īnandavānada kṛṣigē Āḷumāṇiyar jivitakakē Ūnānāsaśigaḷu bījagaḷu kōmba
krayadravyakakē Ū Ētapānē gūḍēgaḷa bēlēgēū sērisi kōṭṭadu tirucirāppaḷḷiya cāvaḍiya maḷēnāḍa mēlēmuṟiyalu Uppūrēmbagrāmadalu prāku nāgamaṅgalada Aṇṇappaōḍēyaru tirukōvalūru Ācāryyapuruṣa ru nallāru nāyinārigē kōṭṭa dharmmaśāsanapramāṇa . rājavibhāṭan Ērēḍuvarēvēli nēlananu dhārāparivarttanēyāgi Īsikōṇḍu Āpaṭa ṭayavanu Uttamanambiyara kaiyalu kōṭṭu Ānallārunāyinārigē pratikṣē travāgi namma Ēkabhōgasarvamānnya Agrahāravāda tiruvārūr cāvaḍiya tirunaṟeyūru paṭṭina māttrarāda bhārati viṭhṭhaṇṇa puradalu mūṟubhāga vanu dhārāparivarttanēyāgi kōṭṭu namma Ittaṇḍada parivarttanēgaḷa pramāṇa Uppura Ēraḍuvarē vēli nēlanatanu namma Amśavāgi māḍikōṇḍu śrīraṅganāthadēvarigē samarppistēvāgi Īnēlanu catussimēgē saḷuva nanjē punjē vān payiru punpayiru nattadamanē vi� ca bā gilavaṇa paṭṭaḍēnibaddhi nidhinikṣēpajalapāṣāṇādyaṣṭabhōga tēja svāmya gaḷu sakalasvarṇādāya sakalabhattādāyagaḷu mattē Ē nīḷasēsē siddhāya vēlavanu Āgumāḍikōṇḍu Īhuṭṭubaḷiyinda Īyatirājanandavānavanupayi ramāḍisi Idaṟa Oḷagē Ēnuḷḷaṇḍā phalavarga puṣpavargagaḷanu Ēndēndū śrīraṅganāthadēvara
tiruvārādhanakakē namma kaiṭhakaryyavāgi Ācandrārkkasthāyi naḍasūdu . sa dvittō guṇaśāli vimalaśrīvatsavamśasambhūtaḥ . pōnnāmbalēśamuktā maṇiriva bhūyāt purandarāyuśrīḥ . Atrikulakamalamitrō mitram pōnnām balēśa sacivasya . ṣaḍvaktrasphuradamalikhadidam śāsanam bhaktryā . [*] śṛbhamastu §rūpāy
Digital edition of SII 24.336 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
